event: Portrait of Saint Cosmas (or self-portrait as Saint Cosmas)
symbols: medical or writing instruments in hand — the healing arts associated with Saints Cosmas and Damian
dark background — focus on the saint's identity and vocation
direct gaze — personal encounter between viewer and saint
description: A half-length portrait of a bearded man with dark hair wearing a cap, dressed in a blue-gray tunic with a red cloak draped over one shoulder. He holds small instruments — possibly surgical tools or writing implements — in his right hand, while his left hand rests on what appears to be a case or palette. His expression is intent and focused, gazing slightly past the viewer. The background is very dark, concentrating attention on the figure. A smaller, less distinct figure is partially visible behind him to the right.
